title: catabrosa pauciflora
intro: Catabrosa pauciflora, also known as fescue or small fescue, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Catabrosa pauciflora is rich in fiber and antioxidants, making it beneficial for digestive health, lowering cholesterol levels, and reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
